formats.name: Short Video 30s
formats.description: Kich ban video ngan tap trung hook nhanh, mot y chinh va CTA ro.

structure.label: 0-3s Hook
structure.goal: Keo su chu y bang loi hua, cau hoi hoac xung dot.
structure.promptCue: Viet 5 hook khac nhau, moi hook duoi 12 tu.

structure.label: 3-7s Context
structure.goal: Noi ro van de va ai nen xem tiep.
structure.promptCue: Giai thich van de bang mot cau gan voi doi song khan gia.

structure.label: 7-23s Value
structure.goal: Dua ra 3 y chinh, buoc lam hoac insight.
structure.promptCue: Chia noi dung thanh 3 beat ngan, moi beat co visual cue.

structure.label: 23-27s Payoff
structure.goal: Ket lai bang ket qua hoac loi ich cu the.
structure.promptCue: Tom tat loi ich bang mot cau de nho.

structure.label: 27-30s CTA
structure.goal: Moi hanh dong tiep theo khong gay ap luc.
structure.promptCue: Viet CTA ngan phu hop muc tieu: follow, comment, inbox hoac luu video.

defaultFields.topic: Cach dung AI de viet caption ban hang nhanh hon

formats.name: Tutorial 60s
formats.description: Huong dan mot tac vu cu the theo cac buoc de xem lam duoc ngay.

structure.label: 0-5s Promise
structure.goal: Noi ket qua nguoi xem se dat duoc.
structure.promptCue: Mo dau bang 'Sau 60 giay ban se...'.

structure.label: 5-12s Setup
structure.goal: Neu cong cu, dau vao hoac dieu kien can co.
structure.promptCue: Liet ke dieu can chuan bi trong 1-2 cau.

structure.label: 12-48s Steps
structure.goal: Huong dan 3-5 buoc theo thu tu.
structure.promptCue: Moi buoc gom hanh dong, ly do va loi meo tranh sai.

structure.label: 48-55s Example
structure.goal: Cho vi du ket qua hoac man hinh can thay.
structure.promptCue: Tao mot example output ngan de chen len man hinh.

structure.label: 55-60s CTA
structure.goal: Moi nguoi xem thu lam va phan hoi.
structure.promptCue: Viet CTA khuyen khich comment ket qua hoac cau hoi.

defaultFields.topic: Tao prompt ban hang tu insight khach hang

formats.name: Long-form YouTube
formats.description: Kich ban video dai co mo bai, phan tich, vi du va retention beat.

structure.label: Cold Open
structure.goal: Dat van de lon hoac ket qua gay to mo.
structure.promptCue: Viet 2 phien ban cold open: story va contrarian.

structure.label: Promise Map
structure.goal: Noi nguoi xem se nhan duoc gi va video di qua nhung phan nao.
structure.promptCue: Tao map 3 phan, moi phan co loi ich cu the.

structure.label: Main Points
structure.goal: Trien khai 3-5 luan diem chinh.
structure.promptCue: Moi luan diem co insight, vi du, buoc lam va loi sai can tranh.

structure.label: Pattern Interrupt
structure.goal: Chen doi nhip de giu retention.
structure.promptCue: De xuat 3 diem chen cau hoi, demo, meme text hoac mini recap.

structure.label: Close
structure.goal: Tom tat va dua next step.
structure.promptCue: Ket bang recap 3 dong va CTA lien quan video tiep theo.

defaultFields.topic: Xay he thong prompt cho san xuat noi dung hang ngay
defaultFields.tone: chuyen sau nhung de ap dung
defaultFields.cta: tai checklist hoac xem video tiep theo

formats.name: Voice-over Ad
formats.description: Kich ban quang cao voice-over co problem, promise, proof va offer.

structure.label: Problem
structure.goal: Goi dung noi dau khach hang.
structure.promptCue: Viet 3 cau problem angle, moi cau duoi 15 tu.

structure.label: Promise
structure.goal: Noi ket qua ma offer dem lai.
structure.promptCue: Viet loi hua cu the, tranh qua da.

structure.label: Mechanism
structure.goal: Giai thich cach offer tao ket qua.
structure.promptCue: Mo ta co che trong 2 cau de tin duoc.

structure.label: Proof
structure.goal: Dua bang chung hoac ly do tin cay.
structure.promptCue: Chen so lieu, review, quy trinh hoac demo neu co.

structure.label: Offer CTA
structure.goal: Keu goi hanh dong cu the.
structure.promptCue: Viet CTA co uu dai hoac buoc tiep theo ro rang.

defaultFields.topic: Dich vu setup chatbot tra loi khach hang

tonePresets.name: Than thien thuc chien
tonePresets.guidance: Dung cau ngan, vi du doi thuong, tranh thuat ngu neu khong can.

tonePresets.name: Manh va nguoc chieu
tonePresets.guidance: Mo dau bang nhan dinh bat ngo, nhung phan value phai co ly le ro.

tonePresets.name: Chuyen gia cao cap
tonePresets.guidance: Gioi han slang, tap trung vao insight, quy trinh va bang chung.

tonePresets.name: Am ap ke chuyen
tonePresets.guidance: Dan bang tinh huong that, co nhan vat va ket qua sau thay doi.

sampleRequests.brief: Viet kich ban TikTok 30s gioi thieu cach dung AI de tra loi comment khach hang nhanh hon.

inputs.topic: AI tra loi comment ban hang

sampleRequests.brief: Viet quang cao voice-over cho goi setup chatbot cho spa nho.

inputs.topic: chatbot tu van lich hen spa
inputs.audience: chu spa co fanpage nhung tra loi cham
